message:
test(proptest): add 10 property tests for runtime health coverage gaps

New tests covering untested robot/data types:
- RemediationEffort serde roundtrip
- StatusCounts serde + total() + Default
- ActiveFailure serde (with skip_serializing_if Option)
- HealthCheckItem serde (with evidence Vec)
- RemediationItem serde (with optional command)
- HealthSummary serde roundtrip
- IncidentEnrichmentData serde roundtrip
- RemediationHint::with_command serde
- CheckStatus Display non-empty

Total: 16→26 tests (10 new), all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
